title: The Anand Marriage Act, 1909
full_text: The Anand Marriage Act, 1909 आनन्‍द विवाह अधिनियम,1909 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 190907 Act Number: 07 Enactment Date: 1909-10-22 Act Year: 1909 Short Title: The Anand Marriage Act, 1909 Hindi Title: आनन्‍द विवाह अधिनियम,1909 Long Title: An Act to remove doubts as to the validity of the marriage ceremony common among the Sikhs called Anand. Short title and extent. Section 2. Validity of Anand marriages. Section 3. Exemption of certain marraiges from Act. Section 4. Saving of marriages solemnized according to other ceremonies. Section 5. Non-validation of marriages within prohibited degrees. Section 6. Registration of marriages.
